defect: absent on the authoring host (macOS); `make`, `make pages`, `make figures` cannot run locally
impact: PDF compile, page-count gate (>=10), and figure rasterization are deferred to a texlive host
workaround: source kept engine-agnostic; figures are pure pgfplots/TikZ standalones (no Python). Compile on any texlive install: `make` then `make pages`.

defect: not installed; the template's fig01_example.py would not render
impact: removed the matplotlib figure path entirely
workaround: rewrote all figures as pgfplots/TikZ .tex standalones so the paper has zero Python dependency

defect: not invoked in-session (no network/imagine backend reachable from the authoring host)
impact: the optional cover art (figures/cover.png) is not rendered
workaround: cover prompt authored at figures/_prompts/cover.txt, ready for `/paper fig square_hd figures/_prompts/cover.txt figures/cover.png` on a connected host. The three data figures already satisfy the figure requirement.
